regime_fall.current_status: Massive U.S. military escalation with 50,000+ regional troops, 3,500 additional forces deployed, and strikes on 9,000+ Iranian targets proceeding despite Trump's diplomatic pause through April 6, while Iran rejects ceasefire demands, implements internet blackouts, and faces succession instability under new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei amid leadership losses and internal security challenges.
regime_fall.last_major_event: 3,000-4,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne Division and thousands of Marines from USS Boxer, USS Portland, and USS Comstock deployed to the Middle East on March 30-31, 2026, alongside Navy SEALs and Army Rangers, bringing total regional force to 53,500+ troops.
